song.title: Reigning Life
song.author: Kelly Scaletta
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C V5 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] . D Bm How I love Your reigning life, Lord. .G A How I love abundant grace. .D Bm How I love to have Your presence, .G A As I live before Your face.
[C] .D Bm By Your life, Lord, I am reigning. .G A I am over, over everything. .D Bm As I’m joyfully confessing, .G A D Jesus, as my Lord and King.
[V2] Sin, you helpless little fellow, Lost your pow’r on Calvary. I have made exchange of masters, Now it’s Christ who rules in me.
[V3] World, with all your little trappings, You oppress with doubts and cares. I have found a new provider, My anxiety He bears. ---
[V4] Self, you cruel manipulator, You I wholly have denied, Daily I will 'gainst you struggle, In Christ’s vict’ry I abide!
[V5] Lord, when You return in glory, When You then the kingdom bring, By Your life my Lord then make me Manifested as a king.
